name: Groudon - Red Megalizard
description:
Artwork created by BlueStarrCreations on FurAffinity.

Requested by This is Sparta!Rayquaza: “Groudon, or ‘Don’ as you mortals call him, gets on my goddamn nerves! He always acts like he knows everything, even though he’s wrong at least...75% of the time! Sometimes, I wish I could just strangle the shit out of him! But that would cause irreparable damage to Planet Earth, so I must restrain myself...for now.”
creator: FrogasaurusRex
